target_customer: Enterprise engineering leaders adopting multiple AI agents in delivery workflows
core_problem: AI-assisted software delivery becomes risky and hard to govern when approvals, audit trails, and task-state controls are inconsistent.
proposed_solution: A governed AI delivery control plane with explicit state transitions, approval gates, artifact validation, and rollback discipline.

value_drivers.customer_outcome: Create verifiable evidence for approvals and release actions

differentiators.claim: Reusable control-plane primitives instead of brittle custom workflows

proof_points: Explicit state machine with approval and rollback semantics
Structured audit trail for governance-critical transitions
draft_uvp_statement: AI-DOS helps enterprise engineering teams govern AI-assisted delivery with machine-enforced approvals, validated artifacts, and auditable state transitions that reduce operational risk.
